title: T-016 — Cascade rollup recursive CTE Server Action (§9.1, §9.2, §11.3 V-FIN-WO-04)
prompt:
# T-016 — Cascade WO cost rollup recursive CTE

PRD: docs/prd/10-FINANCE-PRD.md §9.1 rollup model; §9.2 recursive CTE (Postgres) lines 745-783; §11.3 V-FIN-WO-04 (no cycle) + V-FIN-WO-06 warn; §13.1 wo.completed handler; §15.1 NFR 5-level BOM <10s P95.
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server Action `recalculateWoCost(woId)` that runs the §9.2 recursive CTE over `wo_dependencies` (04-PLANNING-BASIC) to compute `cascade_total_actual` per WO + variance recompute + audit emission. Includes cycle-detection guard (V-FIN-WO-04) and performance budget enforcement.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/finance/work-order-costs/_actions/recalculate.ts`:
   - Server Action `recalculateWoCost(woId: string)` — requires `fin.wo_cost.recalculate` permission.
   - Wraps a single DB transaction:
     1. Pre-flight: detect cycle in `wo_dependencies` for the WO's subtree using a smaller recursive CTE with cycle visited array (`UNION ALL` and `WHERE NOT EXISTS … visited` pattern). If cycle found, raise error citing V-FIN-WO-04 (this should NEVER occur because 04-PLAN V-PLAN-WO-CYCLE prevents it, but defensive check.)
     2. Run the §9.2 cascade CTE pinned to the WO's tree (anchor = leaf WOs reachable from this WO; recursive = parent = own + sum(children.cascade_sum)).
     3. UPDATE `work_order_costs` SET cascade_total_actual = c.cascade_sum, updated_at = now() for all WOs in the tree.
     4. Recompute variance columns (no-op if GENERATED, but cascade_total_actual is not GENERATED — variance still relies on actual columns).
     5. Insert `audit_events` row with cascade payload.
   - Performance: measure execution time; if >10s P95 over last N=20 runs, log warning to observability (Sentry/Logger from foundation T-117/T-118).
2. SQL view `v_wo_cost_with_cascade` joining work_order_costs + child counts for FIN-003 cascade table display.
3. Companion: SECURITY DEFINER function `app.recalculate_wo_cost(wo_id uuid)` callable from the worker handler T-018 (which doesn't have a user session).

## Files
- apps/web/app/finance/work-order-costs/_actions/recalculate.ts [create]
- packages/db/migrations/0056_wo_cost_recalc_function.sql [create] (SECURITY DEFINER fn + view)
- apps/web/app/finance/_lib/__tests__/recalculate.test.ts [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/cascade-cte-cycle.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
- Given a tree P→{A,B}, A→{A1,A2}, when recalculateWoCost(P) runs, then P.cascade_total_actual = sum of all 5 WOs' total_cost_actual.
- Given a leaf WO X, when recalculateWoCost(X) runs, then X.cascade_total_actual = X.total_cost_actual.
- Given a forged cycle (test-only), when recalculateWoCost runs, then pre-flight cycle detection raises V-FIN-WO-04 error and no UPDATE.
- Given a 5-level BOM (32 WOs), when recalculateWoCost runs on root, then execution completes <10s P95. AND Given user lacks fin.wo_cost.recalculate, when action invoked, then ForbiddenError. AND given action commits, when audit_events queried, then a row exists with cascade payload.
_(AC count consolidated from 6→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost))_

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: recalculate.test.ts seeds a 5-level tree fixture; asserts cascade sum matches expected; asserts cycle detection; asserts <10s. cascade-cte-cycle.test.ts seeds a forged cycle and asserts trigger raises.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/finance/_lib/__tests__/recalculate.test.ts && pnpm --filter db test cascade-cte-cycle`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not bypass cycle detection — even though 04-PLAN guards upstream, finance must defensively check.
- Do not run the cascade UPDATE outside a transaction (concurrent updates risk).
- Do not call this synchronously from the wo.completed worker (T-018) — instead, register the recompute via SECURITY DEFINER fn that runs under finance_worker role.
- Do not skip the performance warning logging — NFR §15.1 must be observable.
- Do not store partial results — UPDATE only after the CTE completes.
- Do not query work_orders or wo_dependencies WITHOUT the org_id filter (multi-tenant correctness).
